cards.english: I was a student in that school.
The house was old, but it was beautiful.
Where were you? I was here.
They were friends, and now they are enemies.
The soup was cold, and I was hungry.
You were the best player of the team.
We were in the garden when it happened.
She was sick, and that is why she was in bed.
The doors were open, and the windows were closed.
It was a gift from my grandmother.
Why were you angry with the neighbor?
We were a happy family in that time.
The children were here, but now they are in the park.
The movie was long, and it was boring.
You were nervous because the test was difficult.
The keys were not here; they were in the car.
He was the boss, and she was the owner.
The coffee was for you, not for them.
I was tired, and the day was not over.
Why was that a secret? It was not important.
